# Copilot Instructions

## Discovery Freshness

Whenever new content is added to this repository (skills, agents, guides, or any other artifact), **update all discovery indexes** so users can find it.

### Known discovery indexes

- **`README.md`** (root) — Repository Map and Current Inventory tables.
- **`docs/README.md`** — Guides table for tool setup and MCP configuration.

When a new discovery index is created, add it to the list above so this instruction stays current.

### Checklist (apply after every content addition)

- [ ] New directory path added to root `README.md` → Repository Map?
- [ ] New artifact added to root `README.md` → Current Inventory?
- [ ] New guide added to `docs/README.md` → Guides table?
- [ ] Entry point path in the table is correct and the file exists?
- [ ] If a new discovery index was created, is it listed in this file?
